name: Deem's Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. chicken (boiled or smoked), leftover thawed and reserved
1 package ORIGINAL Uncle Ben's Long Grain and Wild Rice Mix (not quick, not brown)
1 cup mushrooms, or 1 can stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice mix according to package instructions, substituting 1/2 cup dry sherry for half of the liquid and chicken stock for the rest.
2. Add cooked chicken and stir until the rice cools slightly.
3. Mix in sour cream, mushrooms (or water chestnuts), and chopped vegetables.
4. Spray cassarole dish with butter-flavored spray and transfer mixture to the dish.
5. Top with shredded cheddar cheese.
6. Bake until bubbly.
